title: rosa × collina var. lloydii
intro: Rosa × collina var. lloydii, also known as Lloyd's Rose, is a rare and fragrant hybrid rose species. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lloyd's Rose include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Lloyd's Rose can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
